    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      private void addComboTotable()
      add dropdown menu to the elements table create arraylist of dropdowns for reusing or later updates.
      private void addDBentryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      add DB entry button event handler: Show the DB entry window.
      java.lang.String addLinebreaks(java.lang.String input, int maxLineLength)
      Add line breaks for the tooltip text to make it multiline easy to read.
      private void addTablelistener()
      add all the required listener to the elements table Click to highlight the atom shape change values inside x,y,x coordinates and immediatly effect on scenegraph Select Database name value and get values for epsilon, sigma and mass Search type related database names.
      void addTableRows(java.lang.String mSphEre, java.lang.String LspHEre, javax.vecmath.Vector3f mSphcord, javax.vecmath.Vector3f LSphcord)
      used to call from CreateGraphics class to add row in elements table when user click to add new atom also in readfile function to add rows and their specified information.
      private void CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      event handler for Geometry button: Calls BADExtraction class to extract all the bonds, angles and dihedrals Call MolDyn class to calculate geometry from these parameters Remove existing molecular structure from the scenegraph Calculates new parameters and redraw structure with the help of createGraphics class.
      private void centerofmassbtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      Algorithm to calculate the center of mass for molecular structure and sets it as the center of mouse rotation.
      private void CreateElementsTable()
      Create the main elements table set its properties accordingly.
      void EditTableRows(int i_id1, int i_id2)
      used to update the "links" coloumn fo the elements table when there is new atom added or deleted by user
      private java.lang.StringBuffer Extract2Bonds(int[][] B2s)
      Used to get database values from elements table for provided bonds match the provided list of bonds with combination inside the database file Prepare a string buffer to write bonds parameters in the .par file.
      private java.lang.StringBuffer Extract3Bonds(int[][] B2s, java.lang.String OP)
      Used to get database values from elements table for provided angles Used to match the list of angles with combination inside the database file Prepare a string buffer to write angles parameters in the .par file.
      private java.lang.StringBuffer Extract4Bonds(int[][] B2s, java.lang.String OP)
      Used to get database values from elements table for provided dihedrals Used to match the list of dihedrals with combination inside the database file Prepare a string buffer to write dihedrals parameters in the .par file.
      private void formComponentResized(java.awt.event.ComponentEvent evt) 
      private double[] GetCenterOfMass(double[][] Coord, double[] mass, double totalMass)
      Calculate the center of mass of a structure.
      private java.lang.String[] getDBsNames(java.lang.String Filter)
      Get Site_types for the dropdown menus inside elements table.
      private void helpbtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      help button event handler: used to show the help file.
      private void initComponents()
      This method is called from within the constructor to initialize the form.
      private boolean IsDatabaseValueSelected()
      To check if the value is selected in the database column of the elements table.
      private void ljsitebtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      LJ-Site button event handler Calls ljSite function and Show LJsite window.
      static void main(java.lang.String[] args) 
      private void OpenBtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      open button event handler Used to Show open file dialogbox Calls read file method.
      private int[][] PrepareArrayForMatrix()
      Prepare array for calculating the Matrix.
      private void ReadDbNamesForReadFile(java.lang.String[][] ParamSEM, int counter)
      Read following parameters from the Database file: Site_Type, Epsilon, Sigma, Mass.
      private void readHelpxlsxfile()
      read the .xlsx help file find the name and meaning coloumn populate the hashmap (helpmap) key: name coloumn from the help file value: meaning coloumn from the help file.
      private void ReadPMFile(java.lang.String File)
      Clear elements table clear scenegraph read provided file - all the required parameters from the file Draw new structures.
      private void RefreshDBbtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      event handler: used to refresh database values inside the dropmenu of the elements table.
      private void resetbtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      To reset the SceneGraph to its original position
      private void RestartbtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      event handler: used to restart the program using command line method for both operating systems.
      private void SavebtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      Save button event handler.
      private void SavepmFile(java.io.File file)
      used to write the structures in the form of .par files.
      boolean Search(int[] arr, int targetValue)
      Check if the value exist or not
      private void setDBProperties(java.lang.String Value)
      get epsilon , sigma and mass when DB selected.
      private void SetFrame()
      Set the frame size according to the width and height of the screen.
      private void settooltipforlabels()
      Get all the labels and buttons to assign tootip text from the hashmap (helpmap).
      private void StartSceneGraphWindow()
      Start scenegrpah window frame.
      private void undobtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
      undo button event handler to delete the most recent added atom or shape: Calls undoscene function to delete the shapes from scenegraph delete the row from elements table And delete the its lisnks from the ID where it attached to.
      private boolean WriteDBPropertiesInPmFile(java.io.BufferedWriter bw)
      calls Extract2bonds, Extract3bonds and Extract4bonds Write the prepared string buffers by them into the .par file And rest of the required parameters for the par file.

                                      int maxLineLength)

        maxLineLength - Length of a line
        Returns:
        Formatted string

        private void readHelpxlsxfile()
        read the .xlsx help file find the name and meaning coloumn populate the hashmap (helpmap) key: name coloumn from the help file value: meaning coloumn from the help file.

        private void resetbtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
        To reset the SceneGraph to its original position

      • undobtnActionPerformed

        private void undobtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
        undo button event handler to delete the most recent added atom or shape: Calls undoscene function to delete the shapes from scenegraph delete the row from elements table And delete the its lisnks from the ID where it attached to.

      • SavebtnActionPerformed

        private void SavebtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
        Save button event handler.

      • IsDatabaseValueSelected

        private boolean IsDatabaseValueSelected()
        To check if the value is selected in the database column of the elements table.
        Returns:
        True - False

      • centerofmassbtnActionPerformed

        private void centerofmassbtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
        Algorithm to calculate the center of mass for molecular structure and sets it as the center of mouse rotation.
        See Also:
        CreateGraphics.setCenterOfMass(float, float, float)

      • CalculateGeometryActionPerformed

        private void CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
        event handler for Geometry button: Calls BADExtraction class to extract all the bonds, angles and dihedrals Call MolDyn class to calculate geometry from these parameters Remove existing molecular structure from the scenegraph Calculates new parameters and redraw structure with the help of createGraphics class.
        See Also:
        BADExtraction, MolDyn, CreateGraphics

      • GetCenterOfMass

        private double[] GetCenterOfMass(double[][] Coord,
                                 double[] mass,
                                 double totalMass)
        Calculate the center of mass of a structure.
        Parameters:
        Coord - Array of Coordinates of all atoms
        mass - Array of mass values of all atoms
        totalMass - Total mass value of all atoms
        Returns:
        Array of center of mass
        See Also:
        CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent)

        private void RefreshDBbtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt)
        event handler: used to refresh database values inside the dropmenu of the elements table.
        See Also:
        getDBsNames(java.lang.String)

      • ReadPMFile

        private void ReadPMFile(java.lang.String File)
                 throws java.io.FileNotFoundException
        Clear elements table clear scenegraph read provided file - all the required parameters from the file Draw new structures.
        Parameters:
        File - Path of the file to read
        Throws:
        java.io.FileNotFoundException
        See Also:
        CreateGraphics, ReadDbNamesForReadFile(java.lang.String[][], int)

      • ReadDbNamesForReadFile

        private void ReadDbNamesForReadFile(java.lang.String[][] ParamSEM,
                                    int counter)
                             throws java.io.IOException
        Read following parameters from the Database file: Site_Type, Epsilon, Sigma, Mass.
        Parameters:
        ParamSEM - Array of Parameters of the main table
        counter -
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        See Also:
        ReadPMFile(java.lang.String)

        private void StartSceneGraphWindow()
        Start scenegrpah window frame.

      • PrepareArrayForMatrix

        private int[][] PrepareArrayForMatrix()
        Prepare array for calculating the Matrix.

      • SavepmFile

        private void SavepmFile(java.io.File file)
        used to write the structures in the form of .par files.
        Parameters:
        file - Reference of the file to be saved
        See Also:
        WriteDBPropertiesInPmFile(java.io.BufferedWriter)

      • Extract2Bonds

        private java.lang.StringBuffer Extract2Bonds(int[][] B2s)
                                      throws java.io.IOException
        Used to get database values from elements table for provided bonds match the provided list of bonds with combination inside the database file Prepare a string buffer to write bonds parameters in the .par file.
        Parameters:
        B2s - Array of bond list
        Returns:
        Formated string buffer after matching database to the bond list
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        See Also:
        CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent), WriteDBPropertiesInPmFile(java.io.BufferedWriter)

      • Extract3Bonds

        private java.lang.StringBuffer Extract3Bonds(int[][] B2s,
                                             java.lang.String OP)
                                      throws java.io.IOException
        Used to get database values from elements table for provided angles Used to match the list of angles with combination inside the database file Prepare a string buffer to write angles parameters in the .par file.
        Parameters:
        B2s - Array of Angle list
        OP - Operation to be carried out (calculate geometry or writing into file)
        Returns:
        Formated string buffer after matching database to the Angle list
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        See Also:
        CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent), WriteDBPropertiesInPmFile(java.io.BufferedWriter)

      • Extract4Bonds

        private java.lang.StringBuffer Extract4Bonds(int[][] B2s,
                                             java.lang.String OP)
                                      throws java.io.IOException
        Used to get database values from elements table for provided dihedrals Used to match the list of dihedrals with combination inside the database file Prepare a string buffer to write dihedrals parameters in the .par file.
        Parameters:
        B2s - Array of Dihedral list
        OP - Operation to be carried out (calculate geometry or writing file)
        Returns:
        Formated string buffer after matching database to the dihedral list
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        See Also:
        CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent), WriteDBPropertiesInPmFile(java.io.BufferedWriter)

      • WriteDBPropertiesInPmFile

        private boolean WriteDBPropertiesInPmFile(java.io.BufferedWriter bw)
                                   throws java.io.IOException
        calls Extract2bonds, Extract3bonds and Extract4bonds Write the prepared string buffers by them into the .par file And rest of the required parameters for the par file.
        Parameters:
        bw - Reference of the Buffer Writer
        Returns:
        True - False
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        See Also:
        Extract2Bonds(int[][]), Extract3Bonds(int[][], java.lang.String), Extract4Bonds(int[][], java.lang.String)

      • addComboTotable

        private void addComboTotable()
                      throws java.io.IOException
        add dropdown menu to the elements table create arraylist of dropdowns for reusing or later updates.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getDBsNames

        private java.lang.String[] getDBsNames(java.lang.String Filter)
                                throws java.io.IOException
        Get Site_types for the dropdown menus inside elements table.
        Parameters:
        Filter - Sring to be filter
        Returns:
        Array of filtered strings
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        See Also:
        addTablelistener(), RefreshDBbtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent), molecularModeling()

      • addTablelistener

        private void addTablelistener()
        add all the required listener to the elements table Click to highlight the atom shape change values inside x,y,x coordinates and immediatly effect on scenegraph Select Database name value and get values for epsilon, sigma and mass Search type related database names.
        See Also:
        CreateElementsTable()

      • setDBProperties

        private void setDBProperties(java.lang.String Value)
                      throws java.io.IOException
        get epsilon , sigma and mass when DB selected.
        Parameters:
        Value - Name of the database value
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • addTableRows

        public void addTableRows(java.lang.String mSphEre,
                         java.lang.String LspHEre,
                         javax.vecmath.Vector3f mSphcord,
                         javax.vecmath.Vector3f LSphcord)
        used to call from CreateGraphics class to add row in elements table when user click to add new atom also in readfile function to add rows and their specified information.
        Parameters:
        mSphEre - Name of current atom
        LspHEre - Name of last atom
        mSphcord - Old coordinates
        LSphcord - New coordinates
        See Also:
        CreateGraphics.CreateSphere(com.sun.j3d.utils.geometry.Primitive)

      • EditTableRows

        public void EditTableRows(int i_id1,
                          int i_id2)
        used to update the "links" coloumn fo the elements table when there is new atom added or deleted by user
        Parameters:
        i_id1 - Id of one atom
        i_id2 - Id of second atom

        args - the command line arguments
